age_limit.maximum_age: As per the Apprentices Act 1961, Apprentice Rules 1992, and NATS 2.0 / NAPS guidelines

qualification.details: criteria: Details | year of passing: Only candidates who passed the qualifying examination in the last five years (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026) are eligible. qualification.education_qualification: Graduate: B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent with 60% marks in relevant discipline (Library Science: B.Sc. PCM/PCB + B.Lib./B.L.I.Sc. with 60% in each) | Diploma: Diploma in Engineering/Technology or equivalent with 60% marks | ITI: ITI pass with NCVT/SCVT Certificate in relevant trade - all from a recognized Board/University
qualification.experience: Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training under any organization, or who have work experience of 1 year or more after attaining the essential qualification, are NOT eligible.

discipline_wise_breakdown.trade: Information and Communication Technology System Maintenance (ICTSM)

salary_details.pay_scale: Graduate: Rs. 12,300/pm | Diploma: Rs. 10,900/pm | ITI: Rs. 10,560/pm (50% by DEAL + 50% from BOAT under DBT scheme)
salary_details.graduate apprentice: Rs. 12,300/- per month (or as per Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship rates)
salary_details.diploma apprentice: Rs. 10,900/- per month (or as per Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship rates)
salary_details.iti apprentice: Rs. 10,560/- per month (or as per Ministry of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship rates)
salary_details.details: Stipend is disbursed through DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) to Aadhaar-seeded bank accounts. No TA/DA, accommodation, transport, or medical facilities will be provided at any stage of the selection process or during training. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: Depending upon the number of vacancies available in various categories and disciplines
selection of candidates will be carried out by short-listing on the basis of academic merit / written test / interview / walk-in interview or a combination of the above

subject to satisfactory document verification. DEAL reserves the right to adopt its own method of short-listing and is NOT obliged to shortlist all candidates who fulfil the minimum requirements. Mere fulfilment of eligibility does not qualify a candidate for selection. Canvassing/influencing in any form shall lead to disqualification.
Selection shall be deemed final only after the online approval of the apprenticeship contract by the competent authority. If online contract approval is not granted due to any document discrepancy
the apprenticeship shall be deemed cancelled.
how_to_apply: Only online applications will be accepted. Candidates must register and apply through the appropriate portal depending on their qualification level.
Register on NATS 2.0 portal at https://nats.education.gov.in
Apply against the advertised vacancies at DEAL ID: NUKDDC000015
Register on NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
Go to My Opportunities → All Opportunities → Filter → Search by Establishment → Search "Defence Electronics Application Laboratory"
Apply for the relevant opportunity at Establishment Code: E01160500005

Candidates must upload scanned copies of all mandatory documents. Marks must be entered in percentage; CGPA must be converted to percentage as per university norms before applying. Incomplete or erroneous applications, or applications received after the last date, will be rejected.

Documents required at Document Verification: Ink-signed printout of online application; NATS 2.0/NAPS profile signed copy; Mark sheets and certificates from 10th to minimum educational qualification (original or provisional); Aadhaar Card/Photo ID/Address proof; Two recent passport-size colour photographs; SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS certificates (if applicable).

Additional documents required at Joining: Valid Police Verification Certificate; Certificate of Physical Fitness (Government Hospital Medical Officer); Undertaking for adherence to Indian Official Secrets Act 1923; Undertaking for IT Rules & Regulations (Ministry of Defence); Aadhaar-seeded Bank Account details (Pass Book front page/Cancelled Cheque); Three recent passport-size colour photographs.

content_sections.heading: DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 77 apprentice training seats are notified across three levels. Reservations will be applied as per The Apprentices Act 1961 and Apprentice Rules 1992 as amended. Graduate Apprentices – 19 Vacancies Stipend: Rs. 12,300/- per month | Qualification: B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent with 60% marks (Library Science: B.Sc. PCM/PCB + B.Lib./B.L.I.Sc. with 60% in each) Diploma Apprentices – 08 Vacancies Stipend: Rs. 10,900/- per month | Qualification: Diploma in Engineering/Technology or equivalent with 60% marks ITI Apprentices – 50 Vacancies Stipend: Rs. 10,560/- per month | Qualification: ITI pass with NCVT/SCVT Certificate in relevant trade

rows.trade: Information and Communication Technology System Maintenance (ICTSM)

content_sections.heading: DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Graduate: B.E./B.Tech . or equivalent with 60% marks in relevant discipline (Library Science: B.Sc. PCM/PCB + B.Lib./B.L.I.Sc. with 60% in each) | Diploma: Diploma in Engineering/Technology or equivalent with 60% marks | ITI: ITI pass with NCVT/SCVT Certificate in relevant trade - all from a recognized Board/University

Only candidates who passed the qualifying examination in the last five years (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026) are eligible. Candidates whose results have not been declared/available as on the last date of application submission are NOT eligible.
Only candidates who completed the qualifying examination as Regular candidates are eligible. Candidates with higher qualification than prescribed are NOT eligible.

Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training under any organization, or who have work experience of 1 year or more after attaining the essential qualification, are NOT eligible.
Eligible only for designated trades as per Apprenticeship Rules 1992

Graduate/Diploma: Register and apply on NATS 2.0 portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) at DEAL ID: NUKDDC000015 | ITI: Register and apply on NAPS portal (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) at Establishment Code: E01160500005

rows.age_limit: As per the Apprentices Act 1961, Apprentice Rules 1992, and NATS 2.0 / NAPS guidelines

content_sections.heading: DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 - Stipend
content_sections.text: Stipend is disbursed through DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) to Aadhaar-seeded bank accounts. No TA/DA, accommodation, transport, or medical facilities will be provided at any stage of the selection process or during training. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Depending upon the number of vacancies available in various categories and disciplines, selection of candidates will be carried out by short-listing on the basis of academic merit / written test / interview / walk-in interview or a combination of the above, subject to satisfactory document verification. DEAL reserves the right to adopt its own method of short-listing and is NOT obliged to shortlist all candidates who fulfil the minimum requirements. Mere fulfilment of eligibility does not qualify a candidate for selection. Canvassing/influencing in any form shall lead to disqualification. Selection shall be deemed final only after the online approval of the apprenticeship contract by the competent authority. If online contract approval is not granted due to any document discrepancy, the apprenticeship shall be deemed cancelled.

content_sections.heading: Who should NOT apply for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
content_sections.text: Candidates who passed their qualifying examination before 2022; only those who passed in the years 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 are eligible. Candidates whose qualifying examination results have not been declared/published as on the last date of application submission. Candidates who completed their qualifying examination through Distance / Correspondence / Private mode; only Regular candidates are eligible. Candidates who have already undergone apprenticeship training in any organization, or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training, or who have post-qualification work experience of 1 year or more. Candidates with higher qualifications than what is prescribed for the post applied (e.g., a B.Tech. holder cannot apply for Diploma Apprentice posts). Candidates below 18 years of age as on the last date of application. Candidates seeking permanent employment; DEAL explicitly states that no employment (permanent, temporary, or contractual) is offered after completion of apprenticeship training. Candidates who do not have a B.E./B.Tech. with minimum 60% marks (for Graduate posts) or Diploma with 60% (for Diploma posts) or ITI with NCVT/SCVT certificate (for ITI posts); the minimum marks cut-off is strict. PwBD candidates who wish to apply for non-designated trades; PwBD candidates are eligible only for trades designated under Apprenticeship Rules 1992.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes / What to Check Before Applying for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
content_sections.text: Not registering on the correct portal - Graduate/Diploma candidates must use NATS 2.0 (https://nats.education.gov.in) at DEAL ID NUKDDC000015; ITI candidates must use NAPS (https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in) at Establishment Code E01160500005; applying through the wrong portal will result in rejection. Not converting CGPA to percentage before applying; marks must be entered in percentage as per university norms - discrepancies at document verification can lead to cancellation. Providing incorrect marks or mismatched data between the online application and actual certificates; document verification will cross-check all entries and any discrepancy leads to disqualification. Not uploading scanned copies of all mandatory documents while filling the online application form; incomplete applications will be rejected without further correspondence. Checking only email and not the DRDO/DEAL website for updates; all communications including shortlisting, document verification, and joining instructions are sent via email - candidates must ensure their email ID is active and regularly checked. Not arranging required documents for joining well in advance - particularly the Police Verification Certificate and Certificate of Physical Fitness from a Government Hospital Medical Officer; delays in these can cause joining cancellation. Candidates applying who passed in years before 2022; the 5-year qualifying exam window is strictly 2022–2026 only. Not ensuring that the Aadhaar-seeded bank account details are correct for DBT stipend disbursement; incorrect bank details can delay or disrupt monthly stipend payments.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27
content_sections.text: Only online applications will be accepted. Candidates must register and apply through the appropriate portal depending on their qualification level. For Graduate / Diploma Apprentices: Register on NATS 2.0 portal at https://nats.education.gov.in Login on the NATS 2.0 portal Apply against the advertised vacancies at DEAL ID: NUKDDC000015 Apply for the relevant vacancy/discipline For ITI Apprentices: Register on NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in Login on the NAPS portal Go to My Opportunities → All Opportunities → Filter → Search by Establishment → Search "Defence Electronics Application Laboratory" Apply for the relevant opportunity at Establishment Code: E01160500005 Candidates must upload scanned copies of all mandatory documents. Marks must be entered in percentage; CGPA must be converted to percentage as per university norms before applying. Incomplete or erroneous applications, or applications received after the last date, will be rejected. Documents required at Document Verification: Ink-signed printout of online application; NATS 2.0/NAPS profile signed copy; Mark sheets and certificates from 10th to minimum educational qualification (original or provisional); Aadhaar Card/Photo ID/Address proof; Two recent passport-size colour photographs; SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS certificates (if applicable). Additional documents required at Joining: Valid Police Verification Certificate; Certificate of Physical Fitness (Government Hospital Medical Officer); Undertaking for adherence to Indian Official Secrets Act 1923; Undertaking for IT Rules & Regulations (Ministry of Defence); Aadhaar-seeded Bank Account details (Pass Book front page/Cancelled Cheque); Three recent passport-size colour photographs.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date is 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement on https://drdo.gov.in/drdo/en/offerings/vacancies. Candidates must visit the DRDO official website to confirm the exact advertisement publication date and calculate the last date accordingly.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are notified in DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: A total of 77 apprentice training seats are notified - 19 for Graduate Apprentices, 08 for Diploma Apprentices, and 50 for ITI Apprentices across multiple disciplines and trades.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend for DRDO DEAL Apprentices 2026-27?
faq.answer: Graduate Apprentices receive Rs. 12,300/- per month, Diploma Apprentices receive Rs. 10,900/- per month, and ITI Apprentices receive Rs. 10,560/- per month. The stipend is funded 50% by DEAL and 50% from BOAT under the DBT scheme and is disbursed directly to the apprentice's Aadhaar-seeded bank account.

faq.question: Q4. How to apply for DRDO DEAL Graduate/Diploma Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Graduate and Diploma candidates must register and apply online through the NATS 2.0 portal at https://nats.education.gov.in using DEAL ID: NUKDDC000015. ITI candidates must apply through the NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in using Establishment Code: E01160500005.

faq.question: Q5. Can candidates who passed their qualifying exam before 2022 apply for DRDO DEAL Apprenticeship 2026-27?
faq.answer: No. Only candidates who passed the qualifying examination in the last five years - i.e., 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026 - are eligible. Candidates with earlier passing years are not eligible.

faq.question: Q6. Is prior work experience or apprenticeship training a disqualification?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training in any organization, or who have post-qualification work experience of 1 year or more, are NOT eligible.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years. The maximum age and applicable relaxations are governed by the Apprentices Act 1961, Apprentice Rules 1992, and NATS 2.0/NAPS guidelines.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Selection may be based on academic merit, written test, interview, walk-in interview, or a combination of these, depending on the number of applicants, subject to satisfactory document verification. DEAL reserves the right to adopt its own shortlisting method.

faq.question: Q9. Will DRDO/DEAL offer employment after completion of Apprenticeship Training?
faq.answer: No. DEAL explicitly states that NO employment - permanent, temporary, or contractual - is offered to any apprentice at DEAL or DRDO after completion of apprenticeship training.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required at the time of joining DRDO DEAL Apprenticeship 2026-27?
faq.answer: At the time of joining, selected candidates must submit a valid Police Verification Certificate, Certificate of Physical Fitness from a Government Hospital Medical Officer, undertakings for the Official Secrets Act 1923 and IT Rules (Ministry of Defence), Aadhaar-seeded bank account details for DBT stipend, and three recent passport-size colour photographs, along with all original qualification certificates and a self-attested photocopy set.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DRDO DEAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date is 30 days from the date of publication of this advertisement on https://drdo.gov.in/drdo/en/offerings/vacancies. Candidates must visit the DRDO official website to confirm the exact advertisement publication date and calculate the last date accordingly.

faq.answer: A total of 77 apprentice training seats are notified - 19 for Graduate Apprentices, 08 for Diploma Apprentices, and 50 for ITI Apprentices across multiple disciplines and trades.
